languages.text: Амсанкт скрыт за некими пространственными вратами в другой части космоса. Необходимо отыскать способ добраться до него.
Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.
languages.original_text: Амсанкт скрыт за некими пространственными вратами в другой части космоса. Необходимо отыскать способ добраться до него.

traits.locale_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.
Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.
Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

languages.text: Amsanct liegt verborgen hinter einem Dimensionstor in einem anderen Teil des Weltraums. Finde einen Weg, es zu erreichen.
languages.original_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

traits.locale_text: Amsanct liegt verborgen hinter einem Dimensionstor in einem anderen Teil des Weltraums. Finde einen Weg, es zu erreichen.

languages.text: Amsanct se trouve au-delà d'un portail dimensionnel, dans un autre secteur de l'espace. Trouvez un moyen de vous y rendre.
languages.original_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

traits.locale_text: Amsanct se trouve au-delà d'un portail dimensionnel, dans un autre secteur de l'espace. Trouvez un moyen de vous y rendre.

languages.text: 阿姆桑克特隐藏在另一片星域的一道次元门之后。想办法到达那里。
languages.original_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

traits.locale_text: 阿姆桑克特隐藏在另一片星域的一道次元门之后。想办法到达那里。

languages.text: Amsanct se halla tras un portal dimensional en otra región del espacio. Encuentra el modo de llegar.
languages.original_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

traits.locale_text: Amsanct se halla tras un portal dimensional en otra región del espacio. Encuentra el modo de llegar.

languages.text: アムサンクトは宇宙の別の場所にある次元ゲートの向こうに隠れている。そこに到達する方法を見つけよう。
languages.original_text: Amsanct lies hidden behind a dimensional gate in another part of space. Find a way to reach it.

languages.text: Amsanct; uzayın başka bir bölümünde, boyutlar arası bir geçidin ardında gizli. Oraya ulaşmanın bir yolunu bul.

traits.locale_text: Amsanct; uzayın başka bir bölümünde, boyutlar arası bir geçidin ardında gizli. Oraya ulaşmanın bir yolunu bul.
